pageContext.name: Black Widow (Battle of NY)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Black Widow (Battle of NY)! Based on the likeness of Scarlett Johansson from Marvel Studios: The Infinity Saga, this polystone Black Widow statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Marvel fans, don't miss your chance to add Black Widow to your Marvel collection!
